briefdescription.para: Constructs an empty (default-constructed) instance.
Generated from constructor MR.ObjectDistanceMap.ObjectDistanceMap.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.operator=.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.applyScale.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR.Const_DistanceMap dmap, in MR.AffineXf3f dmap2local, bool? needUpdateMesh=null, MR.Std._ByValue_Function_BoolFuncFromFloat? cb=null)
memberdef.name: setDistanceMap

briefdescription.para: rebuilds the mesh; if it is executed in the rendering stream then you can set the needUpdateMesh = true otherwise you should set the needUpdateMesh = false and call the function calculateMesh and after finishing in the rendering stream, call the function updateMesh Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setDistanceMap. Parameter needUpdateMesh defaults to true. Parameter cb defaults to {}.
updates the grid to the current one Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.updateMesh.
reset basic object colors to their default values from the current theme Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.resetFrontColor.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setDirtyFlags. Parameter invalidateCaches defaults to true.

this is a faster version of setDirtyFlags(), which does not invalidate metrics cache (area, volume, ...); the user is responsible for calling invalidateMetricsCache( mask ) or setDirtyFlags( mask ) at the end of mesh editing; DANGER: all cached values returned until then can be outdated Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setDirtyFlagsFast.
invalidates same caches with mesh metrics (area, volume, ...) as by setDirtyFlags( mask ) Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.invalidateMetricsCache.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.selectFaces.
sets colors of selected triangles Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setSelectedFacesColor. Parameter id defaults to {}.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.selectEdges.
sets colors of selected edges Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setSelectedEdgesColor. Parameter id defaults to {}.

Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setSelectedFacesColorsForAllViewports.

set all object solid colors (front/back/etc.) from other object for all viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.copyAllSolidColors.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setCreases.
sets flat (true) or smooth (false) shading Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setFlatShading.
sets whole new ObjectMeshData Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setData.
swaps whole ObjectMeshData with given argument Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.updateData.
sets per-vertex colors of the object Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setVertsColorMap.
swaps per-vertex colors of the object with given argument Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.updateVertsColorMap.

Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.updateTextures.

the texture ids for the faces if more than one texture is used to texture the object texture coordinates (data_.uvCoordinates) at a point can belong to different textures, depending on which face the point belongs to Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setTexturePerFace.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.updateTexturePerFace.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.addTexture.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setUVCoords.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.updateUVCoords.
copies texture, UV-coordinates and vertex colors from given source object

parameterdescription.para: Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.copyTextureAndColors. Parameter thisToSrcFaces defaults to {}.

briefdescription.para: copies vertex colors from given source object

parameterdescription.para: Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.copyColors. Parameter thisToSrcFaces defaults to {}.

briefdescription.para: Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setAncillaryTexture.

Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.updateAncillaryUVCoords.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.clearAncillaryTexture.

overrides file extension used to serialize mesh inside this object: must start from '.', nullptr means serialize in defaultSerializeMeshFormat() Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setSerializeFormat.
reset all object colors to their default values from the current theme Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.resetColors.
set visual property in all viewports specified by the mask Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setVisualizeProperty.
set visual property mask Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setVisualizePropertyMask.
toggle visual property in all viewports specified by the mask Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.toggleVisualizeProperty.
set all visualize properties masks Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setAllVisualizeProperties.

if false deactivates clipped-by-plane for this object and all of its parents, otherwise sets clipped-by-plane for this this object only Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setGlobalClippedByPlane. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.all().

memberdef.argsstring: (in MR.Color color, bool selected, MR._InOpt_ViewportId viewportId=default)
memberdef.name: setFrontColor

briefdescription.para: sets color of object when it is selected/not-selected (depending on argument) in given viewport Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setFrontColor. Parameter viewportId defaults to {}.

sets color of object when it is selected/not-selected (depending on argument) in all viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setFrontColorsForAllViewports. Parameter selected defaults to true.
sets backward color of object in all viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setBackColorsForAllViewports.
sets backward color of object in given viewport Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setBackColor. Parameter viewportId defaults to {}.
sets global transparency alpha of object in given viewport Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setGlobalAlpha. Parameter viewportId defaults to {}.
sets global transparency alpha of object in all viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setGlobalAlphaForAllViewports.
sets the object as can/cannot be picked (by mouse) in all of given viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setPickable. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.all().
sets coloring mode of the object with given argument Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setColoringType.
sets shininess visual value of the object with given argument Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setShininess.
sets intensity of reflections Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setSpecularStrength.
sets intensity of non-directional light Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setAmbientStrength.

set whether the scene-related properties should get their values from SceneColors and SceneSettings instances rather than from the input data on deserialization Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setUseDefaultScenePropertiesOnDeserialization.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setName.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setXf. Parameter id defaults to {}.
forgets specific transform in given viewport (or forgets all specific transforms for {} input) Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.resetXf. Parameter id defaults to {}.
modifies xfs for all viewports at once Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setXfsForAllViewports.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setWorldXf. Parameter id defaults to {}.
if true sets all predecessors visible, otherwise sets this object invisible Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setGlobalVisibility. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.any().
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setLocked.
Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setParentLocked.
removes this from its parent children list returns false if it was already orphan Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.detachFromParent.

adds given object at the end of children (recognized or not); returns false if it was already child of this, of if given pointer is empty; child object will always report this as parent after the call;

parameterdescription.para: if set to false then child object will be excluded from children() and it will be stored by weak_ptr Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.addChild. Parameter recognizedChild defaults to true.

briefdescription.para: adds given object in the recognized children before existingChild; if newChild was already among this children then moves it just before existingChild keeping the order of other children intact; returns false if newChild is nullptr, or existingChild is not a child of this Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.addChildBefore.
detaches all recognized children from this, keeping all unrecognized ones Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.removeAllChildren.
sort recognized children by name Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.sortChildren.
selects the object, returns true if value changed, otherwise returns false Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.select.

ancillary object is an object hidden (in scene menu) from a regular user such objects cannot be selected, and if it has been selected, it is unselected when turn ancillary Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setAncillary.

sets the object visible in the viewports specified by the mask (by default in all viewports) Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setVisible. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.all().
specifies object visibility as bitmask of viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.setVisibilityMask.

swaps this object with other note: do not swap object signals, so listeners will get notifications from swapped object requires implementation of swapBase_ and swapSignals_ (if type has signals) Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.swap.

adds tag to the object's tag storage additionally calls ObjectTagManager.tagAddedSignal NOTE: tags starting with a dot are considered as service ones and might be hidden from UI Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.addTag.
removes tag from the object's tag storage additionally calls ObjectTagManager.tagRemovedSignal Generated from method MR.ObjectDistanceMap.removeTag.

This class stores information about distance map object Generated from class MR.ObjectDistanceMap. Base classes: Direct: (non-virtual) MR.ObjectMeshHolder Indirect: (non-virtual) MR.ObjectChildrenHolder MR.Object MR.VisualObject This is the non-const half of the class.
